title: Melissa Murphy
compiled_truth: Melissa Murphy is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-07-26 to 2002-02-13), Melissa Murphy sent 108 and received 706 emails, totalling 814 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (49), [Kate Symes](people/kate-symes) (41), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (10), [Chris Foster](people/chris-foster) (8), [Janelle Scheuer](people/janelle-scheuer) (3).
